title: Bare leaves
description:
Inspired by bare bones - better leaves
but with no transparency
body:
# **SUMMARY**

This Pack Makes Bare Bones Leaves Look Better. Changed Leaves Are:

Oak leaves, Birch leaves, Spruce leaves, Jungle leaves, Mangrove leaves, Cherry leaves, Azalea leaves, Flowering azaelea leaves.
- the same leaves as Bare bones - Better leaves
- this pack may not be consistently updated but i will listen to feedback













# Bare Bones - Better Leaves
(i am not affiliated with the crator/s of Bare Bones - Better Leaves)
1. [Bare Bones - Better leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-better-leaves)
2. [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/rK5RbYS9Bm)
3. [Github](https://github.com/Creatomat/Better-Animations)
4. [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC0c_GJTYB5CW-WE_LSsKFYg)
